name: John Davidson
abstract: John Hamilton Davidson (born December 13, 1941) is an American actor, singer, and game show host known for hosting Time Machine, Hollywood Squares, and That's Incredible! in the 1980s, and a revival of The $100,000 Pyramid in 1991.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: And then we did “The Girl With Something Extra,” for NBC with Sally Field and John Davidson.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999
